name: Blade Bros Golf Club
about: Blade Bros Golf Club is an indoor golf facility located in Sequim, WA, offering 24-hour access to members and by reservation for the public. The venue utilizes AboutGolf and GS Pro Simulator technology to provide access to over 2000 virtual courses alongside entertainment options like bar games and a miniature golf area. The club is designed as a private virtual indoor golf experience, featuring a pro shop, event space, and a focus on convenience and accessibility for both serious practice and casual play.
why_golfers_like_it: 24-hour access for members allows for practice on any schedule
Access to over 2000 golf courses with world-class simulator technology
Family-friendly environment with entertainment options for all ages
Virtual pro shop available for club testing and modernized equipment

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service found
No information on alcohol service found

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or use the ones available at the facility. They also offer a virtual pro shop with modernized and restored clubs available for testing during your round.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information on BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages) or outside food policies was found on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the exact time to complete 18 holes. However, it mentions that booking more than 2 hours requires repeating the booking process, suggesting that 18 holes likely take at least 2 hours.

faq.question: Is Blade Bros Golf Club kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the club is family-friendly. The venue offers golf-based games, miniature golf courses, and entertainment options suitable for all ages, including children.
